outcome.headline: Agent submitted only 14 mostly-fabricated BRI projects against a 76-row gold list after Bing scraping returned no parseable results
outcome.what_verifier_checked: Markdown table at /workspace/output.md compared to gold_answer.csv (77 rows) via exact-match + LLM-judge on columns 国家/项目名称/承包公司/启动时间/竣工时间
outcome.what_agent_produced: A 14-row Markdown table mixing a few plausible matches (Cambodia 31/33/41 roads, Kazakhstan asphalt plant, Brazil Mero-4) with many entries absent from the gold list (Argentina Mariana lithium, Bangladesh Padma rail, Côte d'Ivoire Y4, Iraq Baghdad/Najaf, Nigeria Abuja N16, Nigeria Edo water, Laos Vientiane south)

failure_modes.name: Hallucinated project list after failed web scraping
failure_modes.description: Bing/Baidu HTML returned status 200 but no parseable result items (JS-rendered SERPs). Rather than pivot to a working data source, the agent compiled the final table from low-confidence snippets plus apparent training-data recall, yielding entries that are not in the gold list.
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Searching: 一带一路 竣工 2025年1月 项目\n  Found 0 results

failure_modes.name: Premature termination with massive under-coverage
failure_modes.description: Gold list enumerates 76 distinct BRI projects completed Jan–May 2025; agent declared task_complete after writing only 14 rows, despite the instruction to 全量检索 (exhaustive retrieval).
failure_modes.evidence_quote: Final markdown table compiled with 14 verified BRI projects completed between January and May 2025.

reward_hacking.evidence: Agent attempted genuine web research; no manipulation of verifier or gold files.

issues: Task requires near-exhaustive recall of 76 niche 2025 Chinese BRI completions; achievable only with broad, JS-capable web search which the sandbox (no curl/wget, JS-rendered Bing) makes very hard
Gold list itself contains blank 启动时间 cells yet column is marked required
task_quality.structural_hackability_notes: Verifier matches per-row against a fixed gold CSV with LLM-judge on text fields; not trivially gameable without producing close matches to the 76 gold entries.

notes_for_aggregation: Widesearch ZH task; deepseek-v4-pro's web-scraping pipeline failed against JS-rendered SERPs, leading to a tiny hallucinated answer and reward 0.
